name: Stuffed Mexican Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Taco Seasoning Mix plus 2 tablespoons
1 1/2 Slices White Bread, torn into bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the white bread slices into fine bread crumbs.
2. In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, tomato sauce, taco seasoning mix (1/2 cup plus 2 tablespoons), green pepper, onion, bread crumbs, and beaten egg. Mix thoroughly.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the shredded cheese and sour cream.
4. Place half of the meat mixture in a greased 9 1/4 x 5 x 2 3/4-inch loaf pan. Make a well in the center of the loaf.
5. Pour the cheese mixture into the well.
6. Place the remaining meat mixture on top of the cheese.
7. Seal the meatloaf well.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F.
9. Let the meatloaf stand for 8 to 10 minutes before slicing.
10. Place slices on a serving platter and garnish with avocado slices. Arrange cherry tomatoes in the center of each avocado slice.
